paperTitle: MemoryVLA: Perceptual-Cognitive Memory in Vision-Language-Action Models for Robotic Manipulation
organization: Tsinghua University / Dexmal / MEGVII / Tianjin University / HIT / StepFun

benchmarks.label: LIBERO
benchmarks.detail: Suites: libero spatial 88.2 · libero object 89.9 · libero goal 78.6 · libero 10 55.5 · libero 90 46.2 | Table 3 | Notes: Standard 4-suite LIBERO protocol with 50 demonstrations per task. LIBERO-90 also reported.

benchmarks.label: SimplerEnv
benchmarks.detail: Suites: widowx vm 42.7 | Table 1 | Notes: Standard SimplerEnv WidowX VM evaluation. Score is cited as a baseline in the citing paper. Same score also reported in: https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.12730.
